name: stackra/offline-sync
purpose: Offline-first sync substrate — SyncCursor aggregate tracks per-device per-entity high-water marks for delta sync from a mobile or offline client.
capabilities: SyncCursor (syc_ prefix) — per-device per-entity high-water mark
when_to_use: A mobile or offline client needs delta sync of entities with high-water-mark tracking per device.
when_not_to_use: For real-time server-push, use stackra/realtime or Reverb broadcast channels directly.
